articles.title: XRP Army Beware: Pro-XRP Lawyer’s Twitter Account Hacked, Don’t Click on the Link He Shared
articles.description: Jeremy Hogan, a lawyer and a popular figure in the cryptocurrency community, especially among XRP fans, was the victim of a Twitter hack. The hacker posted a tweet from Hogan’s account claiming to be feeling generous and offering to double back all XRP tokens sent to a specific wallet address.
